description: The CloudUserInfo component can be used to retrieve information about a user from the Resonite cloud, such as their name or profile picture, based on their user ID.

fields.UserId: The ID of the user that this component should display information about
fields.IsLoaded: Whether or not the given user's information has been loaded
fields.Username: The name of the given user
fields.RegistrationDate: The time that the given user registered their account
fields.OriginalRegistrationDate: The time that the given user registered their account which they migrated from.
fields.IconURL: A URL, pointing to the user's profile picture
fields.IsContact: Whether or not this user is one of your contacts (only works in userspace)
fields._loadedUserId: The user ID corresponding to the information this component is currently outputting. This is an internal value and shouldn't be edited manually.

usage:
To get info about a user, type their user ID into the ``UserId`` field of the component.

You can get their user ID through multiple ways, for example using the Protoflux node or Resonite's cloud API.
